fever.avoid: Cold water, ice cream, oily food
fever.lifestyle_tips: Rest well, drink warm water, avoid exertion

cough.lifestyle_tips: Keep throat warm, avoid dust, drink plenty of water

headache.lifestyle_tips: Rest in dark room, apply cold compress, meditate

cold.lifestyle_tips: Stay warm, get adequate sleep, use humidifier

acidity.lifestyle_tips: Eat light meals, avoid late night eating, maintain posture

indigestion.lifestyle_tips: Chew slowly, walk after meals, drink water regularly
